name: Get AWS IAM Users
description: Retrieves all IAM users for the authenticated AWS account with full attribute set and writes results to JSON

outputParameters.name: UserCount
outputParameters.label: User Count
outputParameters.description: The number of IAM users returned

outputParameters.name: UsersFile
outputParameters.label: Users File
outputParameters.description: The output file name containing IAM user data

outputParameters.name: AccountId
outputParameters.label: Account ID
outputParameters.description: The AWS account ID from which users were retrieved
